currentClaim: Threadsmith v0.2.0 Context sync action surface is implemented: Context 状态 now explains how to handle recovery signals and can open backed hygiene / handoff action previews without pretending sync-context has a true regeneration engine.

doneWhenChecklist.label: 阶段工作台 Context 状态增加处理方式面板
sync-context 诚实说明当前只能先通过 hygiene 重新锚定
run-hygiene / create-handoff 可打开现有动作预览
wait / resume / repair 不展示虚假按钮，只给出处理说明
targeted / full control-deck / build / e2e / diff / JSON checks 全部通过

knownGaps: This slice does not auto-regenerate current-packet.json yet.
This slice does not add multi-provider automation.
sync-context remains a recovery recommendation mapped to existing run-hygiene handling until a real regeneration engine exists.
